ruleset.name: AdminerDesktop
ruleset.description: Type-safety rules for the PHP we wrote: native property types and short array syntax. phpstan (level 6) owns parameter/return/value types; this owns what phpstan cannot say — a property must be a native declaration, not a bare @var — and the [] vs array() style phpstan does not judge. Everything that ships verbatim from the adminer release is excluded: it keeps its own conventions and is not ours to report on.
